Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Court Record; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Hany Boutros In Support Of Motion To Seal Court Record ***Redacted***
Off Calendar Dec-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Hany Boutros's Motion To Seal Court Record is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Defendant must prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Defendant failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
